title: Marketing provider status chip
description: Colour-coded chip for marketing_event / marketing_delivery status. Values: pending (blue), dispatching (yellow), delivered (green), partially_delivered (yellow with warning icon), failed (red), suppressed_by_consent (grey), suppressed_by_provider_off (grey), suppressed_by_circuit_breaker (orange), rate_limited (orange), succeeded (green), superseded (grey with strikethrough).

children.$expr: props.status === 'delivered' ? 'Delivered' : (props.status === 'succeeded' ? 'Succeeded' : (props.status === 'pending' ? 'Pending' : (props.status === 'dispatching' ? 'Dispatching' : (props.status === 'partially_delivered' ? 'Partially delivered' : (props.status === 'failed' ? 'Failed' : (props.status === 'suppressed_by_consent' ? 'Suppressed (consent)' : (props.status === 'suppressed_by_provider_off' ? 'Suppressed (provider off)' : (props.status === 'suppressed_by_circuit_breaker' ? 'Suppressed (circuit open)' : (props.status === 'rate_limited' ? 'Rate limited' : (props.status === 'superseded' ? 'Superseded' : props.status))))))))))
